name: SmartAge spermidine supplementation trial
summary: A 12-month randomized placebo-controlled Phase 2b trial of low-dose spermidine-rich wheat germ extract in older adults with subjective cognitive decline.
population: Adults aged 60 to 90 years with subjective cognitive decline

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Autophagy Induction because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, and safety in Adults aged 60 to 90 years with subjective cognitive decline. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
